properties.title: Luxury 3BHK Apartment
properties.description: Premium 3BHK apartment in the heart of Malviya Nagar with modern amenities, 24/7 security, power backup, and clubhouse access.

properties.title: Independent Villa
properties.description: Spacious independent villa with private garden, modular kitchen, and smart home automation. Located in a premium gated community.

properties.title: 2BHK Near Central Park
properties.description: Well-ventilated 2BHK apartment near Central Park with excellent connectivity to schools, hospitals, and shopping centers.

properties.title: 4BHK Penthouse
properties.description: Exclusive penthouse with terrace garden, jacuzzi, and panoramic city views. Premium construction with Italian marble flooring.

properties.title: Commercial Space
properties.description: Prime commercial space on the main road with wide frontage, dedicated parking, and high visibility for retail or office use.

properties.title: Residential Plot
properties.description: Gated community residential plot with all utilities connected. Clear title, ready for construction, near upcoming metro corridor.
